assessment.note: She says the push was effective but unsustainable, which signals friction around how work is being done and some drag on engagement; also flags a wellbeing concern worth probing next.

new_queue.label: Pace becoming normal
new_queue.name: What would make that pace start becoming normal from your read?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific risk behind the unsustainable push she just named.

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
new_queue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether priorities are crisp or vague; whether they match what you thought.

new_queue.label: Influence bottleneck
new_queue.name: Where are you getting stuck when you try to move decisions forward?
new_queue.description: Maps the specific point where influence breaks down, whether it is people, process, or timing.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What kind of support from me would actually change your week right now?
new_queue.description: Gets concrete about the help Nina wants, rather than generic support language.

new_queue.label: Next-step move
new_queue.name: What’s the first concrete thing you want to shift before we next meet?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into a specific next move without opening a new thread.
